results.title: Kingdom Hearts Collection Switch 2 Local Box Art Reportedly Updated
results.description: Following claims it was using AI. Earlier this month, Square Enix revealed it would be releasing a physical version of the Kingdom Hearts Collection on the Switch 2. Apart from the fact it's a Game-Key Card release, there was also some debate about the key art on the western retail box and the alleged use of AI.
